title: Define retirement plan for bureau.legacy
goal: bureau.legacy is retained for migration and contract compatibility but carries ruff per-file ignores, an unclosed connection in StateStore._initialize, and superseded variants of complete_run and reconcile. Decide whether to freeze it with an explicit compatibility contract or remove it, and record the migration path for remaining importers.

acceptance.assertion: A written freeze-or-remove decision for bureau.legacy exists, including the list of public symbols that must stay importable.
No module outside bureau.core and existing compatibility shims imports bureau.legacy directly, or each remaining import is justified in the decision note.

metadata.audit_finding: legacy module drift: lint ignores, connection leak, superseded semantics
